description_long: This object is a retro-style stereo sound system with a boxy, rectangular form and a sturdy handle on top, wrapped in a brown grip. The front face features two large, hexagonal speaker grilles with metallic and gold accents, flanked by several rotary knobs, switches, and buttons in red, black, and silver. There are also two prominent circular dials, likely for tuning and volume, and a cassette tape slot in the center with a red label. The sides are plain except for some vent-like detailing, while the back is mostly flat with minimal features. The overall color scheme is a mix of gray, black, gold, and red, giving it a classic, industrial look reminiscent of 1980s boomboxes.
description: A retro, boxy stereo sound system with gold-accented speaker grilles, a brown-handled top, and a control panel filled with knobs, buttons, and a cassette slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large speaker grilles, multiple control knobs and buttons, and a central cassette slot.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the handle and vent detailing, with the control panel and speakers barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless back with only minor vent details and no visible controls or speakers.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the handle, vent details, and the protruding shapes of the speaker grilles.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Hexagonal geometric pattern with metallic and gold accents, featuring raised, angular mesh-like surfaces.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A row of red and black buttons, rotary knobs, and switches arranged along the top front, with a cassette slot and additional controls below.
